---
id: get-users
title: "Get Users"
description: "Gets users filtered by given subscription ID and application IDs. When no application IDs are given, they are derived from the calling AAD application."
sidebar_label: "Get Users"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/gds/global-discovery-service-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Users"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/users"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gets users filtered by given subscription ID and application IDs. When no application IDs are given, they are derived from the calling AAD application.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
